project.name: Aniston HRMS
project.description: Enterprise HRMS PWA with 3 attendance modes, AI recruitment, Indian payroll, glassmorphism UI

conventions.apiPattern: REST with { success, data, error, meta } envelope
conventions.componentPattern: Function components with hooks, co-located styles
conventions.namingConvention: camelCase for variables/functions, PascalCase for components/types
